behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests check specific paths like pkg/compose/publish.go and pkg/e2e/compose_run_build_once_test.go, but instruction.md never names these files; agent must discover them. Also tests require >=3 fmt.Fprintf calls, which is a specific count not stated.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the anti-pattern and required documentation topics but doesn't point to specific lines or files for the fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of anti-pattern and presence of fmt.Fprintf/documentation keywords; multiple valid rewrites would satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run go vet, go build, and go test subprocesses in addition to grepping for the pattern.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests verify concrete code changes (no WriteString(fmt.Sprintf anti-pattern, >=3 fmt.Fprintf, no nolint directive, CLAUDE.md contents).

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three required behaviors (anti-pattern fix, nolint removal, CLAUDE.md creation with required content) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass core, Fail-to-pass config/docs) and descriptive names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem categories without naming specific files or line numbers; localization is part of the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff modifies only targeted lines in publish.go and the test file, plus adds a bounded CLAUDE.md.
